name: MATTEL INC /DE/
business: Mattel is a leading global play and family entertainment company that designs, manufactures, and markets toys, games, and related products. Its portfolio includes dolls (Barbie, American Girl), vehicles (Hot Wheels, Matchbox), infant/toddler/preschool (Fisher-Price, Thomas & Friends), and action figures, building sets, games (MEGA, UNO). Products are sold to retailers, wholesalers, and directly to consumers worldwide.

exposures.sentence: Optimize operations and leverage artificial intelligence ("AI") across its systems and supply chain.
Scale digital play through mobile games self-publishing, Mattel163 mobile games studio, licensing, and creator platforms.
AI is increasingly used to enhance product functionality, personalization, content creation, and digital play experiences, further raising consumer expectations and competition.

catalysts.event: Masters of the Universe theatrical release
catalysts.sentence: Mattel's own worldwide theatrical release of Masters of the Universe with Amazon MGM Studios scheduled for Summer 2026.

In Fall 2026, Thomas & Friends plans for a full-franchise relaunch supported by a new brand foundation, refreshed character styling, expanded storytelling across core content platforms, and the introduction of a new toy line.

On February 10, 2026, Mattel announced it had entered into a definitive agreement to acquire the remaining 50% ownership interest in Mattel163 Limited, a mobile games studio, for approximately $159 million, subject to customary closing adjustments.

catalysts.event: Issuance of $600 million senior notes due 2030
catalysts.sentence: in November 2025, Mattel issued $600.0 million of senior notes and used the proceeds of the offering plus cash on hand to repay $600.0 million of senior notes that were scheduled to mature in April 2026.
On February 9, 2026, the Board of Directors authorized a new $1.50 billion share repurchase program.

In 2026, the Action Figures portfolio will be supported by theatrical releases such as Disney Pixar's Toy Story 5 and Mattel's own worldwide theatrical release of Masters of the Universe with Amazon MGM Studios scheduled for Summer 2026.
Apple Original Films Matchbox The Movie premiering in Fall 2026.
